creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to fullermd from comment #10)

Thank you for your feedback.

That clarifies, if I'm understand correctly, that the patch included here, is *not* in 2.7.0 (the current version of the port), but was committed upstream *after* 2.7.0's release ("post 2.7.0"), 

Therefore this bug depends on bug 240242 (to be considered resolved and subsequently closed)

Note: In most circumstances, it is strongly recommended to separate patches for bugfixes, from version updates, so that the former (bugfixes) can be merged to the quarterly branch.

Lean as much as possible to not bundling bugfixes with other changes, in separate bugs, unless it is an undue/unreasonable burden, and instead, produce patches against the current port version where possible.

This bug should be assigned to the committer who is resolving or resolves bug 240242 (currently Yuri)
